data.content: Plan review approved. All referenced files/functions verified to exist. Code contracts (warn-not-reject via eprintln in profile_toml.rs:370 and profile_json.rs:270, fallback chain, build_prompt_params output_hint logic, resolve_output_specific_sections) confirmed accurate. One advisory: profile_tests.rs is at 482/500 lines — route backward-compat tests to step_metadata_tests.rs (395 lines) instead. No invariant violations found. Plan is complete, correct, and feasible.
